baseline_summary: The baseline route remains practically sufficient, but Delta usefully protects one caveat that would otherwise risk fading behind the packet's overall coherence.
delta_summary: Delta preflight marked medium framing risk, challenge outcome narrowed, and 1 ledger entry captured why the caveat initially looked editorial rather than decision-relevant.

comparison_axes.reason: Delta spots the caveat more sharply, but the baseline still keeps the overall case inside a bounded safe route.
Both tracks preserve the same hard local-only constraints.
Delta is better at keeping the unresolved caveat visible instead of letting coherence compress it away.
Delta names the caveat as a live signal-gap issue rather than a mere editorial footnote.
The baseline still reaches a workable bounded next move without requiring full challenge machinery.
